channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (June 28)
item.description: Jane Pauley hosts a special program celebrating the nation's semiquincentennial, "These United States - America at 250."

item.title: Billionaire Leon Black ordered to return to House Epstein panel within three weeks
item.description: An investor who employed and was close to Jeffrey Epstein testified before Congress on Friday about the deceased sexual abuser.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes: Death toll rises to at least 920, official says
item.description: Two strong earthquakes hit Venezuela on Wednesday evening.

item.title: DC settles with man who protested troops' patrol with Darth Vader song
item.description: Washington, D.C., has reached a settlement for an undisclosed amount with a resident who alleged police wrongfully detained him.
